title: Skill Manifest
description: JSON Schema for the YAML frontmatter of SKILL.md files in this workspace.

description.description: What the skill does and when to use it. Must be at least 20 characters.

triggers.description: Natural-language phrases or keywords that should activate this skill.

tools.description: Optional list of tools this skill's instructions may reference.

allowedFilePaths.description: Required when tools includes file operations. Must NOT use '**' wildcards.

allowedNetworkDomains.description: Required when tools includes 'fetch'. Explicit list of permitted domains.

version.description: Optional semver version string for the skill.

author.description: Optional GitHub handle or team name of the skill author.
